questions.text: What is the contributing agency's oRI code?
questions.explanation: Enter the ORI (Originating Agency Identifier) code assigned to the contributing agency by the DOJ. This identifies the agency submitting the live scan — not your personal information.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's authorized Applicant Type?
questions.explanation: Enter the authorized applicant type code for this submission, as assigned or required by the DOJ for your agency's live scan category.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's code assigned by DOJ?
questions.explanation: Enter the type of license, certification, permit, or working title (maximum 30 characters). Use the exact title assigned by the DOJ if applicable.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's agency Authorized to Receive Criminal Record Information?
questions.explanation: Enter the contributing agency's agency authorized to receive criminal record information exactly as it should appear in the "Contributing Agency Information" section on the PDF. This is about the contributing agency, not about you personally.
questions.placeholder: Agency Authorized to Receive Criminal Record Information

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's agency Authorized to Receive Criminal Record Information?
questions.explanation: Enter the five-digit mail code assigned to the contributing agency by the Department of Justice. This is in the Contributing Agency Information section — not your personal address.
questions.placeholder: Agency Authorized to Receive Criminal Record Information

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's street Address or P.O. Box?
questions.explanation: This asks for the contributing agency's street address or P.O. Box — not your personal home address. Find it in the "Contributing Agency Information" section on the PDF.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's agency Authorized to Receive Criminal Record Information?
questions.explanation: Enter the contributing agency's agency authorized to receive criminal record information exactly as it should appear in the "Contributing Agency Information" section on the PDF. This is about the contributing agency, not about you personally.
questions.placeholder: Agency Authorized to Receive Criminal Record Information

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's agency City?
questions.explanation: Enter the city for the contributing agency's address — not your home city.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's agency ZIP Code?
questions.explanation: Enter the ZIP code for the contributing agency's address in the Contributing Agency Information section.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's contact Telephone Number?
questions.explanation: Enter the contact telephone number for the contributing agency — the person who can be reached about this submission.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's billing number?
questions.explanation: Enter the contributing agency's billing number exactly as it should appear in the "Contributing Agency Information" section on the PDF. This is about the contributing agency, not about you personally.

questions.text: What is your first Name?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's first name as it should appear on the completed form.

questions.text: What is your middle Initial?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's middle initial as it should appear on the completed form.

questions.text: What is your applicant Information?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's information as it should appear on the completed form.

questions.text: Do you have an alias?
questions.explanation: Indicate whether the applicant has used any other names or aliases.

questions.text: What is your middle Initial?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's middle initial if they have an alias, as it should appear on the form.

questions.text: What is your other Name:?
questions.explanation: Enter any alias or other name the applicant has used, if different from their legal name.

questions.text: What is your first Name?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's first name if they have an alias, as it should appear on the form.

questions.text: What is your date of Birth?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's date of birth as shown on official records. Use MM/DD/YYYY.

questions.text: What is your driver's License Number?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's driver's license number as it should appear on the completed form.

questions.text: Please select your sex
questions.explanation: Select the option that best describes the applicant's sex as required on the form.

questions.text: What is your weight?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's weight as it should appear on the completed form.

questions.text: What is your weight?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's weight as it should appear on the completed form.

questions.text: What is your height?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's height as it should appear on the completed form.

questions.text: What is your eye Color?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's eye color as it should appear on the completed form.

questions.text: What is your height?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's height as shown on official records. Use MM/DD/YYYY.

questions.text: What is your place of Birth?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's place of birth, including state or country, as it should appear on the form.

questions.text: What is your miscellaneous Number?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's miscellaneous number as it should appear on the completed form.

questions.text: What is your home address?
questions.explanation: Enter the applicant's home street address or P.O. Box. This is their personal residence.

questions.text: What is your applicant Signature?
questions.explanation: This date is automatically set to today's date for the applicant's convenience.

questions.text: What is your OCA number?
questions.explanation: Enter the OCA number, which is the agency's identifying number for this submission.

questions.text: Is this a resubmission?
questions.explanation: Indicate whether this is a resubmission of the applicant's information.

questions.text: What is your original ATI number?
questions.explanation: If resubmitting, enter the original ATI number from the applicant's initial submission.

questions.text: Please select your level of service
questions.explanation: Select whether the applicant requires DOJ, FBI, or both levels of service for this submission.

questions.text: What is your employer's employer Name?
questions.explanation: Provide the name of your employer as it should appear in the Employer section of the form.

questions.text: What is your employer's street Address or P.O. Box?
questions.explanation: Provide the street address or P.O. Box of your employer, not your personal address, for the Employer section.

questions.text: What is your employer's telephone Number?
questions.explanation: Provide the telephone number of your employer for the Employer section of the form.

questions.text: What is your employer's employer City?
questions.explanation: Provide the city where your employer is located for the Employer section of the form.

questions.text: What is your employer's employer ZIP Code?
questions.explanation: Provide the ZIP Code for your employer's address as required in the Employer section.

questions.text: What is your employer's mail code?
questions.explanation: Provide the mail code assigned to your employer by the Department of Justice for the Employer section.
